D2 Vision L4 Analyze Reference

The JND as a Tensor

slide across the colour centres and watch the discrimination ellipse stretch and rotate away from a circle

A uniform colour space would make every threshold a circle. MacAdam's data make it an ellipse, encoding a position-dependent metric — distance is measured differently in every direction.

Slide through the 25 colour centres. The solid ellipse is the measured threshold; the dashed circle is what a uniform space would predict. Read the semi-axes and tilt — the ellipse rarely matches the circle.
